title: August 16
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|August}}

'''August 16''' is the 228th day of the year (229th in leap years). There are 137 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1941|1941]] – [[Paul Hecht]] is born.
*[[1940s#1949|1949]] – [[Barbara Goodson]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Kate Higgins]] is born.
*[[1972]] — [[Paul Sun-Hyung Lee]] is born.
*[[1975]] – [[Taika Waititi]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 28|''Star Wars Weekly'' 28]] published.
*[[1983]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 77|''Star Wars'' (1977) 77]] published.
*[[1993]] – [[Jeff Manning]] is born.
*1993 – [[Cameron Monaghan]] is born.
*[[1994]] – [[Droids (1994) 5|''Droids'' (1994) 5]] published.
*[[2006]] – [[Legacy (2006) 3|''Legacy'' (2006) 3]] published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Jedi Heroes]]'' published.
*2010 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Planets in Peril]]'' published.
*2010 – ''[[Star Wars Year by Year: A Visual Chronicle]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 6|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 6]] published in the United States.
*[[2017]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 34|''Star Wars'' (2015) 34]] published.
*2017 – [[Poe Dameron 18|''Poe Dameron'' 18]] published.
*2017 – "[[Return of the Return of the Jedi]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2022]] – [[Star Wars Rebels (TPB)|''Star Wars Rebels'' trade paperback]] published.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars: The Padawan Cookbook]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[The Princess and the Scoundrel]]'' published.
*2022 – [[The Princess and the Scoundrel (audiobook)|''The Princess and the Scoundrel'' audiobook]] released.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian - The Art & Imagery Collector's Edition, Volume One]]'' published in paperback.
*[[2023]] – [[Darth Vader (2020) 37|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 37]] published.
*[[2024]] – "[[A Pirate's Pet / The Secret Ship]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
<noinclude>
